reasoning: Tesla has famously missed its autonomy timelines for over a decade. Without access to a web search to confirm events closer to the resolution date, relying on the base rate of Tesla delivering on Elon Musk's ambitious timeline yields a low probability. Standard reference classes for such full-self-driving deployment timelines suggest high delays, placing the odds of an unsupervised public launch by October 2025 beneath 10%.
